title: Attention Is All You Need
author: Vaswani et al.
notes: Foundational transformer architecture paper. Essential for understanding modern NLP.

title: Designing Machine Learning Systems
author: Chip Huyen
notes: Practical guide to production ML. Covers data engineering, feature stores, monitoring.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large Language Models: A Survey
author: Gao et al.
notes: Comprehensive survey of RAG techniques, architectures, and evaluation methods.

title: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction
author: Kevin Murphy
notes: Rigorous treatment of probabilistic foundations. Using as reference for Bayesian metrics work.

title: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)
author: Sebastian Raschka
